title: lasianthus tetragonus
intro: Lasianthus tetragonus, a species of flowering plant in the family Theaceae, is a woody shrub native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine, where its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which contribute to its potential in treating various health issues. The health benefits associated with Lasianthus tetragonus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
